posts.text: [VIDEO: Professor Pape: Why Iran GROUND INVASION IS Likely COMING] So, for more on the escalation trap that Trump has gotten caught in in the Iran war, we are fortunate to be joined again by Professor Robert Pap, uh, professor of political science at University of Chicago. Great to see you again, sir. >> Good to see you, sir. >> Thanks for having me. >> Yeah, of course. So, before we jump in, I understand you're having a briefing on this phase of the escalation trap. Just give people the details so that they can learn as much as possible about your framework. >> Yes, I uh my Substack is called the escalation trap. I started it a week before the war to lay out all the stages of what was coming. And I'm sorry to say we are right on track. We're moving from stage one. We're now deep into stage two and we'll be moving likely to stage t
